text.$description: Semantic aliases — resolve at use-site against the active theme's raw palette. The default palette (no data-theme set, e.g. pre-hydration or vitest) is Warm Slate: its raw values are declared once in the shared `:root:not([data-theme]), [data-theme="warm-slate"]` block below, so there is a single source of truth for the default light palette without overriding a named theme.

font-mono.$description: JetBrains Mono is no longer bundled/loaded (spec 055 Phase 1) — the system mono stack is natively hinted on every OS at zero bytes.
